jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Medtronic India
jsonLd.description:
Medtronic India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
